summary: MSFT has source-backed AI platform evidence, but this remains recommendation-only decision support.
bull_case: Bull case: Azure AI demand and platform margins support the long-term thesis.
bear_case: Bear case: valuation and capex intensity could pressure returns.
risk_or_uncertainty: Risk or uncertainty: valuation and capex intensity need continued review.
key_evidence: Company IR and independent channel checks support Azure AI demand.
what_would_change_the_view: A material AI demand slowdown or margin guide-down would change the view.
